Categories.Comment: average aimbot, nothing unique about it and not that crazy customization.
sometimes the visuals just freeze, solid visuals, look almost 1:1 to serotonin/melatonin. decent customization too, but nothing crazy

it's copied from another p2c madrid, me personally i don't believe in copying something from another p2c and selling it as your own product. looks nice, it's alright, but sometimes it bugs out and becomes transparent
crashes randomly, uptime is good, updates frequently, but the overlay freezes rarely. especially using triggerbot, it'll randomly lag you and freeze you.
solid features, theres no game support at all, practically just a dahood external. silent aim flickers your cursor in some games, and void hide frequently crashes you. but solid

Reviews.Author: 1ncg3mfs6z
Reviews.Comment: Overall, I'm impressed. Its just amazing, for the price you get high quality features and good optimization. If your trying to find an external thats great for the price and high quality, GET YERBA NOW!!!!!!!!!!!

Categories.Comment: Its alright, silent is good, aimbot is good. Just like any other external. Not bad.
Really good, good optimization, a lot of features, and absolute no crashing and running smoothly.
Its good, I prefer a more of a simple UI, the UI is good and the interface, but it could be better.

Really good, new update, takes like 2-4 hours to update, sometimes a bit later, but definitely under a day. The developer (Global) listens to people's suggestions and when something is broken he fixes it immediately. Really good result for Global, because he is the only dev. (Slamfrags helps out sometimes though)
Good features, desync, inf jump, orbit, silent aim, headless, speed, more! Its good, just like any other external.
